title: viola tricolor var. lejeunei
intro: Viola tricolor var. lejeunei, also known as Lejeune's pansy or wild pansy, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the violet family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Viola tricolor var. lejeunei can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various ailments, including skin issues and respiratory problems.
